meta.title: Toshi — Get paid the second you charge.
meta.description: Toshi is the payments network for freelancers and small businesses to get paid as easily as Apple Pay — instant payouts, a low 0.9% fee, no subscription, and no account that can be frozen.

hero.subhead: For freelancers and small businesses. No subscription, no holds, no frozen accounts — just low fees.
hero.transitionTitle: Send a link. Get paid in seconds.
hero.transitionSubtitle: Charge clients and customers in seconds — instant payouts straight to your wallet, one low fee, nothing hidden.

problem.title: Getting paid for your own work shouldn't cost this much.
problem.intro: When you run your own thing, every gateway, platform and app store wants a piece before you ever touch your money — a pricey subscription to accept it, a cut off the top, paperwork to qualify, and an account they can freeze whenever they like.

items.title: Pay to get paid
items.body: Pricey developer fees, gateway plans and monthly minimums — just for the right to accept a payment.

items.title: The platform's cut
items.body: Marketplaces and app stores skim up to 30% of income you earned, on every single sale.

items.title: Approval to qualify
items.body: Verified domains, contracts and manual reviews before a freelancer or small shop can charge a cent.

items.title: Frozen income
items.body: Your payout sits in transit for days — and one decision from a processor can freeze it overnight.

solution.title: Charge clients like Apple Pay — without the subscription.
solution.body: Toshi lets freelancers and small businesses accept payments with the simplicity of Apple Pay, minus the subscription, the payout delays and the gatekeepers. Send a link or drop in a checkout, and the money lands in your wallet instantly — for one low fee.
solution.imageCaption: For people who run their own thing and want to keep what they earn.

pillars.title: No subscription
pillars.body: No annual developer fee, no gateway plan, no minimums. You only pay a small fee when money actually moves.

pillars.title: Start in minutes
pillars.body: No forms, no contracts, no approval queue. Share a link and you're getting paid in under 30 seconds.

pillars.title: It's yours
pillars.body: Funds go straight to your wallet the instant you're paid — no payout delays, no holdbacks, no account anyone can freeze.

twoSides.title: Get paid with Toshi. Spend it with Toshi.
twoSides.subtitle: Everything starts with accepting money — and the same wallet lets you spend it the moment it lands.

charge.title: Charge clients and customers
charge.body: Send a payment link, drop a checkout into your site, or take it in person. No gateway paperwork, no subscription, no long contracts.
points: Instant payouts straight to your wallet
No subscriptions, no gatekeepers, no holdbacks

pay.title: Then spend what you earned
pay.body: The money you're paid is already in your wallet — spend it anywhere Toshi is accepted, as simply as Apple Pay.
points: Pay in seconds with Face ID or fingerprint
No frozen accounts, no hidden fees
Your money stays in your wallet until you spend it

network.title: Both sides, connected.
network.subtitle: No middleman sitting between you and your income. The payment goes straight from your client to you.

steps.label: Your client
steps.title: Pays in one tap
steps.body: Confirms with a passkey — the same flow as Apple Pay.

steps.label: Toshi
steps.title: Routes it openly
steps.body: Toshi coordinates the payment without ever holding your money or deciding when you get paid.

steps.label: You
steps.title: Get paid instantly
steps.body: Funds land directly in your wallet, ready to use.

network.footnote: No approvals. No custody. No one deciding when — or if — you get paid.

howItWorks.title: Four steps. No runaround.
howItWorks.subtitle: From opening Toshi to your first payment — sent or received — it takes less than thirty seconds.

steps.title: Create or connect your wallet
steps.body: A passkey on your device is enough. No seed phrase to store, no extension to install.

steps.title: Pay or share a charge
steps.body: Pay with a tap, or generate a link, QR or SDK to get paid. Works on web, app and in person.

steps.title: Confirm with a passkey
steps.body: Approve with Face ID or fingerprint. The same flow as Apple Pay — without the restrictions.

steps.title: Settle instantly
steps.body: Money moves straight between wallets, ready to use, convert or spend.

benefits.title: Built to cost less and pay you faster.

items.title: No subscription
items.body: No annual developer fee, no gateway plan, no minimums. You only pay a low 0.9–1.5% fee when money actually moves.

items.title: Low, flat fee
items.body: Just 0.9–1.5% per transaction — lower than Stripe, with no marketplace skimming 30% off your sale.

items.title: No gatekeepers
items.body: No one can pause your account, freeze your funds or decide whether you qualify to get paid.

items.title: Instant payouts
items.body: Funds land in your wallet the moment you're paid — no multi-day settlement, no opaque holdbacks.

items.title: Clients anywhere
items.body: Get paid from Madrid, Buenos Aires or Tokyo with the exact same flow.

items.title: Drop-in checkout
items.body: Payment links, QR or open SDK — add Toshi to your site or invoice in minutes.

forWhom.title: Built for people who run their own thing.
forWhom.imageCaption: From a one-person studio to a growing small business.

items.title: For client work
items.body: Send an invoice link, get paid, see it in your wallet in seconds — no platform skimming 30%.

items.title: For your audience
items.body: Sell directly to your followers without an app store or marketplace taking a cut of every sale.

items.title: For your shop
items.body: Accept payments at the counter or online — no six-month contracts, no monthly gateway fee.

items.title: For your product
items.body: Add payments with an open SDK — no pricey developer subscription just to charge customers.

security.title: Serious security, zero setup.
security.body: Toshi protects every payment with the passkeys already built into your phone — the same Face ID or fingerprint you use to unlock it. Nothing to install, nothing for us to leak.

items.title: Native passkeys
items.body: Approve payments with Face ID, Touch ID or Windows Hello. The key never leaves your device.

items.title: Approved on your device
items.body: Every payment is confirmed on your own hardware. Your credentials never touch our servers.

items.title: Money only you control
items.body: Your funds go straight to you and stay yours — never pooled in an account we could freeze or lose.

items.title: Nothing to steal
items.body: We don't store a pot of your cash or sensitive details, so there's no honeypot for attackers to target.

finalCta.title: Get paid the second you charge.
finalCta.body: Join the waitlist and be one of the first freelancers and small businesses on the Toshi network.

footer.tagline: Get paid the second you charge.
